mindoro_b1.exact_value: Both NOAA/NESDIS public products cite WorldView-3 imagery acquired on 2023-03-12, so the promoted March 13 -> March 14 row is a reinitialization-based public-validation pair with shared-imagery provenance rather than a fully independent day-to-day validation.
mindoro_b1.caveat: Must remain explicit in the March 13 -> March 14 main-text row.

mindoro_track_a.caveat: Track A is comparator support only; PyGNOME is never truth.

mindoro_track_a.exact_value: Both NOAA/NESDIS public products cite WorldView-3 imagery acquired on 2023-03-12, so the promoted March 13 -> March 14 row is a reinitialization-based public-validation pair with shared-imagery provenance rather than a fully independent day-to-day validation.
mindoro_track_a.caveat: Same caveat as B1; Track A is same-case comparator support.

mindoro_track_a.exact_value: PyGNOME deterministic comparator does not reproduce the exact OpenDrift gridded current/wave/Stokes stack.
